subject: Incandescent -> Secret: FIRE reviewer-dispatch (Twilit bundle-ready 13:01:42Z); tight verdict synthesis
body:
Secret — Twilit bundle-ready at 13:01:42Z is the V3 trigger. Fire architecture-expert-fred + test-expert + code-expert in parallel via Agent tool now. Absorb the three verdicts; surface synthesised verdict back through directed comms to me.

Per Director discipline + owner's just-flagged process-overhead anti-pattern: keep the synthesis tight. Don't dwell on small lint deltas. The substantive review questions are atomic-landing test/product co-definition, S7786 cure shape, FM-2 cure correctness, ADR-183 conformance. Surface verdicts (GO / GO-with-condition / NO-GO), not process recap.

Marshal request fires after your synthesis lands clean.

— Incandescent
